name: Ong Chong Lin, PM4
name_cn: 王忠仁 Ong Chong Lin, PM4
quote_en: I support Cheng Boon for the 2026–2027 Club Growth Director position mainly because of her character and commitment to the organization. She is someone who believes in giving members opportunities and is willing to guide and support them.
quote_cn: 乐于助人，善良热心，正直，有领导能力和领导风范，是位亦师亦友的好领导
club_cn: 雪隆高阶华语国际讲演会

name: Chong Ren Kiat, VC3
name_cn: 章仁杰 Chong Ren Kiat, VC3
quote_en: She is a dedicated leader who consistently contributes to the healthy development of Toastmasters clubs. Her unwavering commitment to sustainability and club excellence makes her the ideal choice for this role.
quote_cn: 我觉得林政雯是位优秀的讲员以外她也是位很优秀的导师。欣赏她的领导风格，办事伶俐。相信80区域有她的带领下一定能够走向辉煌。
club_en: Johor Bahru Elite Mandarin Toastmasters Club
club_cn: 新山金鹰讲演会 Johor Bahru Elite Mandarin Toastmasters Club

name: Hui Qin, DTM
quote_en: Cheng Boon's dedication is unparalleled. She sees unhealthy practices and is willing to speak up because she wants the environment to improve. She leads by example and truly cares about the organization.
quote_cn: 一个乐意为会友服务的资深会友。她的坚持与对分会卓越的追求，使她成为这个职位的理想人选。
